SEARCH

Package org.stellar.sdk.requests

package org.stellar.sdk.requests
Provides request builder classes for the Horizon API.

Each builder class corresponds to a Horizon REST endpoint and allows setting query parameters (cursor, limit, order, filters) before executing the request. Common base functionality such as pagination parameters is provided by RequestBuilder.

Builders that support Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming expose a stream() method for real-time event subscription. Streaming maintains a persistent connection and automatically reconnects on failure.

Request builders are obtained from the Server entry point. For example: 


 Server server = new Server("https://horizon.stellar.org");
 Page<TransactionResponse> page = server.transactions()
     .forAccount("G...")
     .limit(10)
     .order(RequestBuilder.Order.DESC)
     .execute();
See Also:
  • Server
  • Horizon pagination
  • Horizon streaming
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.stellar.sdk
    Core classes for the Java Stellar SDK.
    org.stellar.sdk.requests.sorobanrpc
    Provides request types for Stellar RPC (formerly Soroban-RPC).
  • Class
    Description
    AccountsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /accounts endpoint.
    AssetsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /assets endpoint.
    ClaimableBalancesRequestBuilder
    Builds requests connected to claimable balances.
    ClientIdentificationInterceptor
    An OkHttp Interceptor that adds client identification headers to every outgoing HTTP request.
    EffectsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests connected to effects.
    EventListener<T>
    This interface is used in RequestBuilder classes stream method.
    FeeStatsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /fee_stats endpoint.
    LedgersRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /ledgers endpoint.
    LiquidityPoolsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /liquidity_pools endpoint.
    OffersRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /offers endpoint.
    OperationsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /operations endpoint.
    OrderBookRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /order_book endpoint.
    PaymentsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /payments endpoint.
    RequestBuilder
    Abstract class for request builders.
    RequestBuilder.Order
    Represents possible order parameter values.
    ResponseHandler<T>
    Handles HTTP responses and converts them into typed Java objects.
    RootRequestBuilder
    Builds requests connected to root.
    SSEStream<T extends Response>
    Implements Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming from a Horizon endpoint.
    StrictReceivePathsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /paths/strict-receive endpoint.
    StrictSendPathsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /paths/strict-send endpoint.
    TradeAggregationsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests connected to trades.
    TradesRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /trades endpoint.
    TransactionsRequestBuilder
    Builds requests to the Horizon /transactions endpoint.
